title: Teltonika RUTX50 Industrial 5G Router
description: Teltonika RUTX50 is an industrial multi-network router that offers 5G mobile communication for high-speed and data-intensive applications. 5G mobile communication with the option of dual SIM configuration is combined with 5 Gigabit Ethernet ports and dual-band Wi-Fi enabling reliable data transmission with ultra-low latency The power of 5G technology combined with a wide range of interfaces and industrial hardware features ensures adaptability for future upgrades and expansion of the entire system Compact size Powerful 5G / WiFi system Supports GNSS positioning RUTX50 is shipped with RutOS which provides advanced security features and specialized industry protocols for a wide range of professional application scenarios. It is fully compatible with Teltonika RMS remote management with the possibility of monitoring large groups of devices Combined router with variable connection Durable aluminum cover Supports 5G networks, dual-band WiFi ac and fixed gigabit ethernet RutOS operating system Interfaces: 5Ã 10/100/1000 Mbps (1Ã WAN, 4Ã LAN), 4Ã SMA for 5G, 2Ã RP-SMA for WiFi, 1Ã SMA for GNSS, 1Ã digital in, 1Ã digital out, 1Ã USB, 2Ã SIM slot (Mini SIM â 2FF)
